entity: Stephen Curry 2024-25 regular-season scoring rank (per-game leaders). Curry finishes the season around rank 18-20 with ~24 PPG; BBR 2024-25 leaders page lists him at 24.5 PPG.
notes: Pins the 2024-25 Regular-season scoring leaders query to include Curry. Exact stat_rank (warehouse=20, BBR=18) and stat_value (warehouse=24.04, BBR=24.5) differ slightly because the warehouse's GP cut/aggregation is not identical to BBR's per-game page; the row-presence assertion pins Curry in the leaderboard without locking to a single rank.
